message: Rajasthan East drought index crossed 0.85 and crop stress is rising.
recommended_action: Deploy drought relief and shift supply to alternate origin zones.

message: Bihar North flood probability crossed 0.70 for the near-term horizon.
recommended_action: Pre-position stocks outside floodplain and reroute incoming shipments.

message: Primary Punjab to Rajasthan corridor is blocked due to weather damage.
recommended_action: Switch to alternate roads and raise local inventory buffers by 20%.
